platforms.name: OpenAI
platforms.notes: Industry standard. Batch API gives 50% discount with 24h SLA.

platforms.name: Anthropic
platforms.notes: Prompt caching gives 90% discount on cached tokens. Batch API 50% off.

platforms.name: Google Vertex AI / AI Studio
platforms.notes: Context caching gives 75% discount. Very competitive pricing on Flash models.

platforms.name: Groq
platforms.notes: Fastest inference. Free tier generous for prototyping. Custom LPU hardware.

platforms.name: Together AI
platforms.notes: Good for open-source models. Fine-tuning support. Dedicated endpoints available.

platforms.name: Fireworks AI
platforms.notes: Fast inference with optimized serving. Good pricing for open-source models.

platforms.name: Replicate
platforms.notes: Pay per second of compute. Good for image/audio models. Easy custom model deployment.

platforms.name: AWS Bedrock
platforms.notes: Enterprise-grade. VPC integration. Provisioned throughput for consistent performance.

platforms.name: Azure OpenAI
platforms.notes: Enterprise-grade. Same models as OpenAI with Azure compliance. PTU for provisioned throughput.

platforms.name: OpenRouter
platforms.notes: Unified API for many providers. Automatic fallback. Good for testing multiple models.

platforms.name: Hugging Face Inference Endpoints
platforms.notes: Deploy any HuggingFace model. Auto-scaling. Pay per hour of compute.

platforms.name: RunPod
platforms.notes: Cheapest GPU cloud for many configs. Serverless and dedicated options.

platforms.name: Lambda Labs
platforms.notes: Competitive H100/A100 pricing. Good for training and inference.

platforms.name: Vast.ai
platforms.notes: Community GPU marketplace. Cheapest but less reliable. Good for experimentation.

platforms.name: Ollama (Local)
platforms.notes: Free local inference. Good for privacy-sensitive use cases. Requires capable GPU.
